heroSubtitle: Enter a public repository URL to try it out
howItWorksSub: Start your commit review routine in 3 steps
connectDesc:
Sign in with GitHub and
select a repository to review.
generateDesc:
AI analyzes your commit history
and turns it into flashcards.
recallDesc:
Get daily reminders and flip cards
to review what you learned yesterday.
featuresSub: A learning tool designed for developers
aiCardsDesc: AI analyzes GitHub commits to extract key concepts and convert them into learning cards.
spacedRepetitionDesc: Get reminders at the optimal review time based on the Ebbinghaus forgetting curve.
codeDiffReviewDesc: Review code changes with GitHub-style diff, like a real code review.
ctaSubtitle: Start for free — all you need is a GitHub account.
